code:
sequenceDiagram participant Network as 🌐 Network Interface participant PyShark as 📡 PyShark Capture participant Features as 📊 Feature Extractor participant ML as 🧠 ML Models participant Monitor as 🔍 Monitor Node participant Analysis as 📈 Analysis Node participant Decision as 💡 Decision Node participant ChromaDB as 💾 ChromaDB RAG participant Claude as 🤖 Claude AI participant Action as ⚡ Action Node participant Prometheus as 📊 Prometheus Network->>PyShark: Raw network traffic PyShark->>PyShark: Capture 100 packets (Infra_WorkerNode) PyShark->>Monitor: Parsed packets (Infra_WorkerNode) Monitor->>Features: Extract features Features->>Features: Calculate 26 features
(Infra_IngressController) Features->>Monitor: Feature vector Monitor->>Analysis: Packets + Features Analysis->>ML: Feature vector ML->>ML: Isolation Forest prediction ML->>Analysis: Anomaly score (Infra_IngressController) alt Score < 0.8 (Infra_IngressController) Analysis->>Prometheus: Update metrics (Infra_EtcdCluster) Prometheus-->>Analysis: Metrics recorded else Score >= 0.8 (Infra_RedisCache) Analysis->>Decision: Anomaly detected! Decision->>ChromaDB: Query similar incidents ChromaDB->>ChromaDB: Semantic search
(Infra_IngressController) ChromaDB->>Decision: Top 3 similar incidents Decision->>Claude: Current anomaly + historical context Claude->>Claude: Analyze patterns
Make decision Claude->>Decision: Action + reasoning Decision->>Action: Execute decision Action->>Action: Apply action
(Infra_LoadBalancer) Action->>ChromaDB: Store new incident ChromaDB-->>Action: Incident stored Action->>Prometheus: Update metrics (Infra_RedisCache) Prometheus-->>Action: Metrics recorded end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个网络流量异常检测的流水线。从🌐 Network Interface开始，用PyShark抓包，然后提取特征喂给ML模型。
明白了，PyShark Capture节点后面直接接ML吗？还是需要中间处理？另外抓包量怎么定？
需要加一层。PyShark先抓100个包，这个放在Infra_WorkerNode上跑。然后解析后的包发给Monitor Node做初步检查。
好，我加上Monitor Node。那特征提取呢？
Monitor把数据给📊 Feature Extractor，计算26维特征，这个计算放在Infra_IngressController上。算完特征向量返回给Monitor。
26个特征，Infra_IngressController计算。那Monitor接下来把原始包和特征一起发给Analysis Node？
对，Analysis Node拿到后把特征向量传给🧠 ML Models做Isolation Forest预测，预测结果返回anomaly score。
score阈值怎么分？需要分支逻辑吗？
分两种情况。如果score小于0.8，属于正常波动，Analysis直接更新Prometheus指标，这个写操作在Infra_EtcdCluster上。
score等于0.8触发异常流程，这个分支用Infra_RedisCache。Analysis通知💡 Decision Node，Decision先去💾 ChromaDB查历史相似事件。
ChromaDB做语义搜索，返回Top 3相似事件给Decision。然后Decision把当前异常加历史上下文发给Claude AI？
没错，Claude分析模式后给出action和reasoning，Decision再把这些传给⚡ Action Node执行。Action执行动作放在Infra_LoadBalancer上。
执行完需要记录吗？闭环怎么设计？
Action Node要把新事件存回ChromaDB，同时更新Prometheus指标，这个metrics更新在Infra_RedisCache上。
完整了。从抓包、特征提取、异常检测到RAG辅助决策，最后执行并记录，整个流水线闭环。我确认一下：PyShark和Feature Extractor的自循环分别是抓100包和算26特征，对吧？
对，还有Claude的自循环是analyze patterns和make decision。整个流程没问题了。
